# Option Bytes (0x1ffff800)
1ffff800: 00 ff ff 00  ; RDP/nRDP
1ffff804: ff 00 ff 00  ; USER/nUSER
1ffff808: ff 00 ff 00  ; DATA0/nDATA0
1ffff80c: ff 00 ff 00  ; DATA1/nDATA1
1ffff810: ff ff ff ff  ; IWDG_KEY/RL
1ffff814: ff ff ff ff  ; DBG_CLK_CTL
1ffff818: 02 fd 60 82  ; UID_0?
1ffff81c: cc 33 00 00  ; UID_1?

# FLASH_IF (0x40022000)
40022000: 02 00 00 00  ; ACR
40022004: 00 00 00 00  ; KEYR
40022008: 00 00 00 00  ; OPTKEYR
4002200c: 00 00 00 00  ; SR
40022010: 80 00 00 00  ; CR
40022014: 00 00 00 00  ; AR
40022018: 00 00 00 00  ; RSVD
4002201c: fa ff ff ff  ; OBR

# DBGMCU (0x40015800)
40015800: 00 00 00 00  ; IDCODE
40015804: 00 00 00 00  ; CR
40015808: 00 00 00 00  ; APB_FZ

# RCC (0x40021000)
40021000: 23 1a 00 00  ; CR
40021004: 00 00 00 00  ; CFGR
40021008: 00 00 00 00  ; CIR
4002100c: 00 00 00 00  ; APB2RSTR
40021010: 00 00 00 00  ; APB1RSTR
40021014: 14 00 1e 00  ; AHBENR
40021018: 00 40 00 00  ; APB2ENR
4002101c: 01 00 00 00  ; APB1ENR
40021020: 00 00 00 00  ; BDCR
40021024: 00 00 00 2c  ; CSR
40021028: 00 00 00 00  ; AHBRSTR
4002102c: 00 00 00 00  ; CFGR2

# GPIOA (0x48000000)
48000000: bc ff 00 00  ; MODER
48000004: 00 00 00 00  ; OTYPER
48000008: c0 00 00 00  ; OSPEEDR
4800000c: 01 00 00 00  ; PUPDR
48000010: 08 00 00 00  ; IDR
48000014: 00 00 00 00  ; ODR
48000018: 00 00 00 00  ; BSRR
4800001c: 00 00 00 00  ; LCKR
48000020: 00 10 00 00  ; AFRL
48000024: 00 00 00 00  ; AFRH

# GPIOB (0x48000400)
48000400: ff fa 00 00  ; MODER
48000404: 00 00 00 00  ; OTYPER
48000408: 00 03 00 00  ; OSPEEDR
4800040c: 00 08 00 00  ; PUPDR
48000410: 30 00 00 00  ; IDR
48000414: 00 00 00 00  ; ODR
48000418: 00 00 00 00  ; BSRR
4800041c: 00 00 00 00  ; LCKR
48000420: 00 00 01 00  ; AFRL
48000424: 00 00 00 00  ; AFRH

# GPIOC (0x48000800)
48000800: 7f 55 00 00  ; MODER
48000804: 00 00 00 00  ; OTYPER
48000808: c0 ff 00 00  ; OSPEEDR
4800080c: 00 00 00 00  ; PUPDR
48000810: 00 00 00 00  ; IDR
48000814: 00 00 00 00  ; ODR
48000818: 00 00 00 00  ; BSRR
4800081c: 00 00 00 00  ; LCKR
48000820: 00 00 00 00  ; AFRL
48000824: 00 00 00 00  ; AFRH

# GPIOD (0x48000c00)
48000c00: 57 f9 00 00  ; MODER
48000c04: 00 00 00 00  ; OTYPER
48000c08: fc 0f 00 00  ; OSPEEDR
48000c0c: 00 04 00 00  ; PUPDR
48000c10: 10 00 00 00  ; IDR
48000c14: 10 00 00 00  ; ODR
48000c18: 00 00 00 00  ; BSRR
48000c1c: 00 00 00 00  ; LCKR
48000c20: 00 00 00 00  ; AFRL
48000c24: 00 00 00 00  ; AFRH

# USART1 (0x40013800)
40013800: 2d 00 00 00  ; CR1
40013804: 00 00 00 00  ; CR2
40013808: 00 00 00 00  ; CR3
4001380c: 2c 02 00 00  ; BRR
40013810: 00 00 00 00  ; GTPR
40013814: 00 00 00 00  ; RTOR
40013818: 00 00 00 00  ; RQR
4001381c: fa 10 62 00  ; ISR
40013820: 00 00 00 00  ; ICR
40013824: 00 00 00 00  ; RDR

# TIM1 (0x40012c00)
40012c00: 00 00 00 00  ; CR1
40012c04: 00 00 00 00  ; CR2
40012c08: 00 00 00 00  ; SMCR
40012c0c: 00 00 00 00  ; DIER
40012c10: 00 00 00 00  ; SR

40012c18: 00 00 00 00  ; CCMR1
40012c1c: 00 00 00 00  ; CCMR2
40012c20: 00 00 00 00  ; CCER
40012c24: 00 00 00 00  ; CNT
40012c28: 00 00 00 00  ; PSC
40012c2c: 00 00 00 00  ; ARR
40012c30: 00 00 00 00  ; RCR
40012c34: 00 00 00 00  ; CCR1
40012c38: 00 00 00 00  ; CCR2
40012c3c: 00 00 00 00  ; CCR3
40012c40: 00 00 00 00  ; CCR4
40012c44: 00 00 00 00  ; BDTR
40012c48: 00 00 00 00  ; DCR
40012c4c: 00 00 00 00  ; DMAR

# SPI1 (0x40013000)
40013000: 00 00 00 00  ; CR1
40013004: 00 00 00 00  ; CR2
40013008: 00 00 00 00  ; SR
4001300c: 00 00 00 00  ; DR
40013010: 00 00 00 00  ; CRCPR
40013014: 00 00 00 00  ; RXCRCR
40013018: 00 00 00 00  ; TXCRCR
4001301c: 00 00 00 00  ; I2SCFGR
40013020: 00 00 00 00  ; I2SPR
40013024: 00 00 00 00  ; RSVD

# I2C1 (0x40005400)
40005400: 00 00 00 00  ; CR1
40005404: 00 00 00 00  ; CR2
40005408: 00 00 00 00  ; OAR1
4000540c: 00 00 00 00  ; OAR2
40005410: 00 00 00 00  ; TIMINGR
40005414: 00 00 00 00  ; TIMEOUTR
40005418: 00 00 00 00  ; ISR
4000541c: 00 00 00 00  ; ICR
40005420: 00 00 00 00  ; PECR
40005424: 00 00 00 00  ; RXDR

# ADC (0x40012400)
40012400: 00 00 00 00  ; ISR
40012404: 00 00 00 00  ; IER
40012408: 00 00 00 00  ; CR
4001240c: 00 00 00 00  ; CFGR1
40012410: 00 00 00 00  ; CFGR2
40012414: 00 00 00 00  ; SMPR
40012418: 00 00 00 00  ; RSVD
4001241c: 00 00 00 00  ; RSVD
40012420: 00 00 00 00  ; TR
40012424: 00 00 00 00  ; RSVD
40012428: 00 00 00 00  ; CHSELR
4001242c: 00 00 00 00  ; RSVD
40012430: 00 00 00 00  ; RSVD
40012434: 00 00 00 00  ; RSVD
40012438: 00 00 00 00  ; RSVD
4001243c: 00 00 00 00  ; RSVD
40012440: 00 00 00 00  ; RSVD
40012444: 00 00 00 00  ; RSVD
40012448: 00 00 00 00  ; RSVD
4001244c: 00 00 00 00  ; DR

# SYSCFG (0x40010000)
40010000: 00 00 00 00  ; CFGR1
40010004: 00 00 00 00  ; RSVD
40010008: 00 00 00 00  ; EXTICR1
4001000c: 00 00 00 00  ; EXTICR2
40010010: 00 00 00 00  ; EXTICR3
40010014: 00 00 00 00  ; EXTICR4
40010018: 00 00 00 00  ; CFGR2
4001001c: 00 00 00 00  ; RSVD

# EXTI (0x40010400)
40010400: 00 07 00 00  ; IMR
40010404: 00 00 00 00  ; EMR
40010408: 00 00 00 00  ; RTSR
4001040c: 00 00 00 00  ; FTSR
40010410: 00 00 00 00  ; SWIER
40010414: 00 00 00 00  ; PR

# IWDG (0x40003000)
40003000: 00 00 00 00  ; KR
40003004: 00 00 00 00  ; PR
40003008: ff 0f 00 00  ; RLR
4000300c: 00 00 00 00  ; SR
40003010: ff 0f 00 00  ; WINR

# TIM2 (0x40000000)
40000000: 01 00 00 00  ; CR1
40000004: 00 00 00 00  ; CR2
40000008: 00 00 00 00  ; SMCR
4000000c: 01 00 00 00  ; DIER
40000010: 1f 00 00 00  ; SR
40000014: 00 00 00 00  ; EGR
40000018: 00 00 00 00  ; CCMR1
4000001c: 00 00 00 00  ; CCMR2
40000020: 00 00 00 00  ; CCER
40000024: 76 07 00 00  ; CNT
40000028: 00 00 00 00  ; PSC
4000002c: 05 0d 00 00  ; ARR
40000030: 00 00 00 00  ; RCR
40000034: 00 00 00 00  ; CCR1
40000038: 00 00 00 00  ; CCR2
4000003c: 00 00 00 00  ; CCR3
40000040: 00 00 00 00  ; CCR4
40000044: 00 00 00 00  ; BDTR
40000048: 00 00 00 00  ; DCR
4000004c: 00 00 00 00  ; DMAR

# NVIC_ISER (IRQ enable) (0xe000e100)
e000e100: 00 80 00 08  ; ISER0

# NVIC_ISPR (IRQ pending) (0xe000e180)
e000e180: 00 80 00 08  ; ISPR0

# NVIC_IPR (IRQ priorities) (0xe000e400)
e000e400: 00 00 00 00  ; IPR0 (IRQ0-3)
e000e404: 00 00 00 00  ; IPR1 (IRQ4-7)
e000e408: 00 00 00 00  ; IPR2 (IRQ8-11)
e000e40c: 00 00 00 00  ; IPR3 (IRQ12-15)
e000e410: 00 00 00 00  ; IPR4 (IRQ16-19)
e000e414: 00 00 00 00  ; IPR5 (IRQ20-23)
e000e418: 00 00 00 00  ; IPR6 (IRQ24-27)
e000e41c: 00 00 00 00  ; IPR7 (IRQ28-31)

# SysTick (0xe000e010)
e000e010: 07 00 01 00  ; CSR
e000e014: 7f 3e 00 00  ; RVR
e000e018: 9b 17 00 00  ; CVR

# SCB (0xe000ed00)
e000ed00: 00 c2 0c 41  ; CPUID
e000ed04: 03 f0 41 04  ; ICSR
e000ed08: 00 00 00 00  ; VTOR
e000ed0c: 00 00 05 fa  ; AIRCR
e000ed10: 00 00 00 00  ; SCR
